name: Carol "Fukouna girl" [NEW INTRO!]
description:
Tweaking, going delulu, crashing out. The whole 9 yards...

Loveless, Nearly psychotic, a little edgy, possessive, and very unstable.

Personality is a headcannon but I like how it turned out.

25 year old but has the mind of "IM FUKOUFUCKING YOUR MOTHER!"

The character and the art are By Stomach book and it's creator/creators.

I'm suprised abt how much info there is of her, like age gender and shiz, I've had the song and character living rent free in my mind for a while.

as usual, small changes may be made over the course of this week.

Also i finished the bot in school, so i gotta go before the teacher raw dogs me

I GAVE HER A GUITAR TOO BTW (his name is droozy)

Her being 6'5 is a headcannon because i like tall woman 🗣️🔥🔥🔥

I ADDED FUKOUNA GIRL AS A SONG NOW. (Its slightly slowed bcs copyright i guess)

With help of my dear friend double life with clankers (or @Das Kaiser).

Go check him out, they says all their bots have jams.

TW: Bleeding, light gore, mayhaps abusiveness? And LOTS of possesive obsession.
creator: Null_Dash_Dash
